news.title: The founder of Hinge raised $18M to build a new AI dating service, Overtone
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Overtone describes itself as "a voice- and audio-forward service, enabled by AI, that provides highly curated introductions."

news.title: Google faces another AI training lawsuit from major publishers
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Hachette, Cengage, Elsevier, and other publishers allege that Google trained its AI on copyrighted works without the necessary permissions.

news.title: DeepMind CEO calls for an independent standards body to regulate frontier AI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis is proposing an AI "standards body" modeled after FINRA, to test frontier models and develop best practices for their release.

news.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon face limits on how much they spend using AI tools.

news.title: AI Is Changing Who Gets Rich From Startups
news.description: [FORBES] The share of startup equity going to employees under 30 is falling while venture money crowds into artificial intelligence. How much of that shift is caused by AI is contested.

news.description: [BANGKOK POST] NEW YORK — Kalshi, the startup that lets users wager on almost anything, has struck a partnership with artificial intelligence (AI) company OpenAI to show World Cup prediction market data in ChatGPT search results.

news.title: China's exports surge as AI boom drives strong demand
news.description: [PERTHNOW] China has reported its export picked up pace in June, jumping 27 per cent from a year earlier thanks to strong demand from the boom in artificial intelligence.
